title: CyberAgent Accelerates AI Adoption with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
summary: CyberAgent integrates ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to enhance productivity and decision-making across its advertising, media, and gaming divisions. The move underscores the growing enterprise demand for secure, scalable AI solutions.
body:
CyberAgent, a leading internet services company, has announced the deployment of ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to streamline operations and boost efficiency across its advertising, media, and gaming sectors. By leveraging these advanced AI models, CyberAgent aims to accelerate decision-making processes, improve content quality, and scale AI adoption securely within its organization.

This strategic move highlights the increasing reliance on enterprise-grade AI solutions to drive business innovation. CyberAgent's adoption of ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex reflects a broader industry trend where companies are integrating AI to enhance productivity and maintain a competitive edge. The models' capabilities in natural language processing and code generation are particularly valuable for CyberAgent's diverse portfolio.

As CyberAgent continues to expand its AI initiatives, the company is likely to explore further integrations and customizations to meet specific business needs. The success of this deployment could set a precedent for other enterprises looking to scale AI adoption securely and efficiently. The ongoing evolution of AI technologies will undoubtedly play a pivotal role in shaping CyberAgent's future strategies and operations.
twitterThread:
🚀 CyberAgent just turbocharged its AI game with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex.

Here's why this is a BIG deal:

They're using it across advertising, media, and gaming. Yes, all at once.

Decision-making? Faster. Content quality? Better. Scalability? Secure.
The wild part? This isn't just about chatbots. Codex is helping with code generation too. Devs just got a major upgrade.
Let that sink in. A company this big is all-in on AI. If CyberAgent is moving this fast, who's next?
Hot take: This is the blueprint for enterprise AI adoption in 2026. Scalable. Secure. And, most importantly, useful.
standaloneTweet: CyberAgent just went all-in on AI with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex. Faster decisions, better content, and secure scaling across advertising, media, and gaming.
